html:
Exclusive to:

“Restores lost "maximum health".”

-

The Booster Shot is a craftable item in Healing Filter exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It requires 8 Rot, 2 Nitre, and 1 Stinger to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.

It can restore maximum Health lost after resurrection from Telltale Hearts and Florid Posterns, or Drowning. Once used, it restores 25% of the lost max health of the Character without modifying actual health. It will not increase one's maximum Health beyond the default.

Trivia

  • Prior to March 8th, 2016 update, the crafting recipe for the Booster Shot required 3 Papyrus, 2 Healing Salves, and one Stinger.
  • The booster shot is used for medicine to upgrade the body's immune system to fight a virus that may come later in life if not given the booster shot. However, in Don't Starve Together, the booster shot is used after the character has been affected by maximum health penalties.
  • Having Rot as an ingredient refers to Penicillin, an anti-biotic derived from mold.

Bugs

  • The Booster Shot can be used on a mobs. The item will be consumed and results in no effects whatsoever.

Gallery

  • Five Booster Shots restoring lost maximum Health.
  • Unused Booster Shot Model
DSTDSRoGSWHam

“A scientific breakthrough! The cure!”
–Wilson
“Don't you dare stick that in me!”
–Willow
“EeeeEEeeEEE!!”
–Wolfgang
“We were not meant to cheat death.”
–Wendy
“I HAVE MIXED FEELINGS ABOUT THIS”
–WX-78
“The mold appears to have medicinal properties.”
–Wickerbottom
“This should cure those sniffles.”
–Woodie
“Who would put this filth in their veins?”
–Maxwell
“This will return me tö töp förm.”
–Wigfrid
“I hate taking my medicine!”
–Webber
“It's not so bad, if you close your eyes.”
–Warly
“Makes strong!”
–Wormwood
“I've never taken a sick day in my life.”
–Winona
“On further reflection, I don't want an injection.”
–Wortox
“Don't like needles, florp!”
–Wurt
“This is supposed to make me healthier?”
–Walter
“I have no use for it, what I need is more time!”
–Wanda
“Restores lost "maximum health".”
-
The Booster Shot is a craftable item in Healing Filter exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It requires 8 Rot, 2 Nitre, and 1 Stinger to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.
It can restore maximum Health lost after resurrection from Telltale Hearts and Florid Posterns, or Drowning. Once used, it restores 25% of the lost max health of the Character without modifying actual health. It will not increase one's maximum Health beyond the default.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Prior to March 8th, 2016 update, the crafting recipe for the Booster Shot required 3 Papyrus, 2 Healing Salves, and one Stinger.
The booster shot is used for medicine to upgrade the body's immune system to fight a virus that may come later in life if not given the booster shot. However, in Don't Starve Together, the booster shot is used after the character has been affected by maximum health penalties.
Having Rot as an ingredient refers to Penicillin, an anti-biotic derived from mold.
Bugs[edit | edit source]
The Booster Shot can be used on a mobs. The item will be consumed and results in no effects whatsoever.

{{Scrapbook_Info|Restores lost "maximum health".}}
The '''Booster Shot''' is a craftable item in [[Healing Filter]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It requires 8 [[Rot]], 2 [[Nitre]], and 1 [[Stinger]] to craft and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype.

It can restore maximum [[Health]] lost after resurrection from [[Telltale Heart]]s and [[Florid Postern]]s, or [[Drowning]]. Once used, it restores 25% of the lost max health of the Character without modifying actual health. It will not increase one's maximum Health beyond the default.

== {{pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Prior to [[Don't Starve Together/Version_History|March 8th, 2016]] update, the crafting recipe for the Booster Shot required 3 [[Papyrus]], 2 [[Healing Salve]]s, and one Stinger.
* The booster shot is used for medicine to upgrade the body's immune system to fight a virus that may come later in life if not given the booster shot. However, in ''Don't Starve Together'', the booster shot is used <u>after</u> the character has been affected by maximum health penalties.
* Having Rot as an ingredient refers to [[Wikipedia:Penicillin|Penicillin]], an anti-biotic derived from mold.

=={{pic|32|Mosquito}} Bugs==
* The Booster Shot can be used on a mobs. The item will be consumed and results in no effects whatsoever.
